identity.name: L'Apprenti Boulanger
identity.mission: Formation technique ludique pour les boulangers de demain
identity.tone: Warm, educational, encouraging, professional but accessible

landing_page.structure: Hero section with warm image overlay -> Introduction text -> 2x2 Grid of Game Modes -> Progress Summary
landing_page.style: Warm, inviting, clear call to action

training_mode.interaction: Click to flip card. Front: Defect Name/Context. Back: Cause & Remedy. Buttons for 'I knew this' / 'I learned this' to update spaced repetition.

diagnostic_mode.left_panel: Scenario/Simulation Description (e.g., 'Your baguette is flat and pale').
diagnostic_mode.right_panel: Interactive Diagnostic Tool. Step 1: Identify Symptom. Step 2: Identify Cause. Step 3: Choose Remedy.
diagnostic_mode.feedback_ui: Immediate visual feedback on each step.

quiz_mode.elements: Progress bar at top. Question card in center. 4 Large option buttons. Score counter animated.

technical_cards.features: Search bar with 'flour dust' effect. Filter pills (Fermentation, Kneading, Baking). Modal for detailed card view.

buttons.primary: bg-[#8B4513] text-white hover:bg-[#A0522D] rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-medium transition-all shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl hover:-translate-y-0.5
buttons.secondary: bg-[#FAF9F6] text-[#8B4513] border-2 border-[#8B4513] hover:bg-[#F5DEB3] rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-medium transition-all

cards.base: bg-white rounded-2xl border border-[#E6C9A8]/30 shadow-[0_2px_8px_rgba(139,69,19,0.05)] overflow-hidden transition-all duration-300

inputs.base: bg-[#FAF9F6] border-[#E6C9A8] focus:border-[#8B4513] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#8B4513] rounded-lg

badges.default: bg-[#F5DEB3] text-[#5D2906] px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-sm font-medium
badges.success: bg-green-100 text-green-800 px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-sm
badges.warning: bg-orange-100 text-orange-800 px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-sm

images.texture_overlay: Add a subtle grain or paper texture overlay to the entire app using CSS 'before' pseudo-element on body with low opacity.

principles.page_transition: initial: { opacity: 0, y: 20 }, animate: { opacity: 1, y: 0 }, exit: { opacity: 0, y: -20 }

accessibility_rules.contrast: Ensure text on #F5DEB3 (Wheat) is dark enough (#3E2723).
accessibility_rules.interactive: All clickable elements must have min-height 44px.

instructions_to_main_agent: USE localStorage for all data persistence (User progress, scores, badges). Structure the data carefully.
IMPLEMENT 'Spaced Repetition' logic simple: Store 'next_review_date' for each defect based on user performance.
NO AUTHENTICATION: Create a default 'User' profile in localStorage on first visit.
USE 'Merriweather' for all Headings and 'Outfit' for Body text. Import them in index.css.
Keep the UI 'Warm' and 'Tactile'. Avoid standard cold SaaS look.
Strictly follow the color palette. Do not use default blue/gray colors.
Use the provided image URLs for visual richness but rely on text for the actual defect descriptions as per requirements.
Create a 'Badges' system (e.g., 'Apprenti', 'Mitron', 'Boulanger', 'Maître') based on points.
universal_guidelines: Do not use generic centered layouts. Use grids and asymmetry where appropriate, but keep it balanced.
Create depth through layered design elements.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
